Jana Horn Live & Red Henry and the House of Bamboo Genes
Tuesday, February 3, 2026
9:00 PM
10:00 PM
Google Calendar
ICS
Jana Horn is a writer and musician from Tx, based in Brooklyn. Her work has been described by The New Yorker as "aligning with a fraternity of the lonely that cuts across genres: traces of Young Marble Giants, Syd Barrett, and Broadcast all waft through." At Gene's, she'll be performing as a full band with drummer Adam Jones, bassist Jade Guterman and flute/clarinetist Adelyn Strei. Horn's third album released January 16, 2026 on No Quarter Records.
View Event →

meta.meta_description:
Discover Gene's offerings including to-go meals, catering, events, and gift 
cards at our Atlanta location. Convenient service and delicious food await.
